subcodes.first_line: O thou who yearnest for the threshold of the Desired One! In former cycles a tradition hath been handed down: "Deeds are judged by their intentions." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق درگه حضرت مقصود در کور سابق حدیثی روایت کرده اند الاعمال بالنیات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @goodly deeds; actions, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
